notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by third baseman Isaac Paredes. Endy Rodríguez scores. Jake Mangum to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by third baseman Isaac Paredes. Endy Rodríguez scores. Jake Mangum to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Cam Smith out at 2nd. Brice Matthews out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a ground ball to third baseman Isaac Paredes. Nick Gonzales to 2nd. Nick Gonzales advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Isaac Paredes.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Christian Walker. Ryan O'Hearn out at 2nd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Endy Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Endy Rodríguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Oneil Cruz out at 2nd. Endy Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by third baseman Isaac Paredes. Endy Rodríguez scores. Jake Mangum to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Enyel De Los Santos picks off Jake Mangum at 1st on throw to first baseman Christian Walker.
